# pangolin_target (Resource)

Manages a Pangolin target (backend endpoint for an HTTP resource).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pangolin_target" "example" {
  resource_id = pangolin_resource.example.id
  site_id     = pangolin_site.example.id
  ip          = "192.168.1.10"
  port        = 8080
  method      = "http"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address or hostname of the target (e.g. 'localhost', '10.0.0.1').
- `port` (Number) The port of the target.
- `resource_id` (Number) The ID of the HTTP resource this target belongs to.
- `site_id` (Number) The ID of the site that serves this target.

### Optional

- `method` (String) The method (http or https). Defaults to http.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the target.
